title: Autoimmunity Basics
script_summary: A deep dive into the fundamentals of autoimmunity, revealing how our own bodies can turn against us.

segments.voiceover: Here's what science actually says about autoimmunity basics.
Autoimmunity occurs when your immune system mistakenly attacks your own cells. How does that happen?
Genetics, infections, and environmental factors can trigger this response. Surprising, right?
Recent studies suggest that stress and diet also play roles, but research is still ongoing.
Understanding autoimmunity can lead to better treatments and outcomes. Isn’t that fascinating?
Want to learn more about your body? Hit follow for insights on science!
